news.title: Segulah evolves into Amplio Private Equity
news.description: Swedish PE firm Segulah rebrands to Amplio on 1 February 2024. Same team, evolved investment strategy focused on Business Services and IT & Technology Services.

news.title: Consortium Led by Global Infrastructure Partners and EQT Agrees to Acquire AES
news.description: GIP, EQT Infrastructure VI, CalPERS and QIA to acquire AES for $15/share ($10.7B equity, ~$33.4B enterprise value). Positions AES to accelerate growth as leading clean energy platform across the Americas.

news.title: Nordic Capital Is Said to Weigh €2 Billion Sale of Conscia
news.description: Nordic Capital is considering a sale of Danish cybersecurity firm Conscia and seeking a valuation of more than €2 billion. The firm is working with Arma Partners on the potential divestment.
